affected_pattern: Active customer with InternetService=Fiber, MonthlyCharges suddenly 0
root_cause: Billing system failed to process billing record for current cycle. Likely cause: billing record ingestion pipeline timeout during batch processing window, resulting in zero-rated billing record.
supporting_evidence: IBM Telco Billing Operations Standards Section 5.2 (billing accuracy) — billing record processing timeout handling
SLA Document — Section 3.1: Billing accuracy guarantee >= 99.5%
Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: billing record Ingestion Pipeline Timeout pattern
recommended_action: Trigger billing record reprocessing for affected account
Verify billing pipeline health for batch window
